title: Palak Paneer Spinach Cottage Cheese

seo.title: Authentic Palak Paneer Recipe | Easy Indian Spinach & Paneer
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Palak Paneer with our easy step-by-step recipe. This creamy Indian spinach and cottage cheese curry is perfect for a delicious vegetarian meal.
seo.h1: Authentic Palak Paneer Recipe: Indian Spinach & Cottage Cheese Curry
h2Headings: Pro Tips for the Best Palak Paneer
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of creamy, vibrant green Palak Paneer with cubes of cottage cheese, garnished with fresh cream.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy this delicious homemade Palak Paneer, a classic Indian vegetarian dish featuring spinach and paneer in a rich, flavorful gravy.

description: Palak Paneer is a beloved Indian vegetarian curry featuring fresh spinach puree and soft cubes of paneer cottage cheese. This vibrant green dish is rich in flavor, subtly spiced, and incredibly wholesome, making it a perfect meal for any occasion. Enjoy the comforting blend of earthy spinach and creamy paneer in an aromatic gravy.

ingredients.notes: slit or finely chopped, adjust to taste

instructions.title: Blanch the Spinach
instructions.text: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the washed spinach and blanch for 2-3 minutes until wilted. Immediately transfer the spinach to an ice bath to stop the cooking process and retain its vibrant green color. Drain well and blend into a smooth puree with a little water if needed.

instructions.title: Prepare the Paneer
instructions.text: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil or ghee in a pan. Lightly fry the paneer cubes until golden brown on all sides. This adds a nice texture and prevents them from breaking. Remove and set aside.

instructions.title: Sauté Aromatics
instructions.text: In the same pan, add the remaining oil or ghee. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter. Then add the chopped onions and saute until they turn golden brown. Add the ginger garlic paste and green chilies, cooking for another minute until fragrant.

instructions.title: Cook the Masala Base
instructions.text: Add the tomato puree to the pan and cook until the oil starts to separate from the mixture, stirring occasionally. This indicates the tomatoes are well cooked. Now, add turmeric powder, coriander powder, and salt. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent burning.

instructions.title: Combine Spinach and Paneer
instructions.text: Pour the spinach puree into the masala base. Mix well and bring to a gentle simmer. If the curry is too thick, add a little water to achieve your desired consistency. Add the fried paneer cubes and gently stir them into the spinach curry.

instructions.title: Finish and Garnish
instructions.text: Stir in the garam masala and crushed Kasuri Methi. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Serve hot, garnished with a swirl of fresh cream if desired.

tips: For the brightest green spinach puree, blanch the spinach quickly and immediately plunge into ice water. This halts cooking and preserves color.
If you prefer softer paneer, add the paneer cubes directly to the curry without frying. Alternatively, soak fried paneer in warm water for a few minutes before adding.
To make this dish vegan, substitute paneer with firm tofu and use coconut cream or cashew cream instead of dairy cream.
article: Palak Paneer Spinach Cottage Cheese is a beloved Indian Vegetarian dish enjoyed across Indian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
